title: 【转载】暖心，阵亡图瓦俄军的母亲收到当地政府慰问的一大包饺子

meta_keywords: 转载,暖心,阵亡,图瓦,俄军,母亲,收到,当地,政府,慰问,大包,饺子
contents:
文章转载于不知名网站，新闻照片可以在推特、红迪搜到

In the Russian Tuva, the local authorities in the village of Aldan-Maadyr thanked the family of an occupier who was eliminated during the war in Ukraine with a pack of dumplings.

Local officials announced their gift on social media and noted that they timed it for the New Year, which is celebrated in Tuva on February 17 according to the Shagaa lunar calendar.

Dumplings were given to the family of the deceased mobilized as part of the "Lipy dobro" campaign.

Valentina Ondar, the mother of three sons, received such a gift.

Her youngest son "died heroically" in the war in Ukraine, killing Ukrainians in Lysychansk.

Valentina's second son is also at war in Ukraine.

The officials handed the second pack of dumplings to the large family of Ondar A.A., judging by the surname, they are also relatives of the deceased occupier.

We will remind, at the beginning of February widows of liquidated collaborators from the occupied Donbas and the so-called "volunteers" distributed fur coats.

In turn, the widows were happy with such an exchange - a fur coat for a husband, and sincerely thanked for the "unexpected gift".

But the women did not enjoy such a "gift" for long, because after the photo shoot in the propaganda media, the "volunteers" took the fur coats back.


在图瓦的一个村庄，一个名叫Valentina Ondar的拥有三个儿子的英雄母亲近日收到了当地政府的慰问，她的小儿子此前在「解放利西昌斯克」的伟大事业中阵亡了，而此刻她的二儿子正在为「解放顿巴斯人民」而奋战。

于是，当地政府在2.17图瓦的shagaa历新年之际带了大袋饺子来慰问这个英雄家庭，没有让俄罗斯联邦英雄感到寒心。

该文章还提及二月初顿巴斯慰问俄军阵亡家属的暖心事迹，当局为英雄家属们每人准备了一件皮大衣，美中不足的是拍照过后某些不怀好意的「志愿者」居然将皮大衣进行了回收，这无疑是对俄罗斯国防部的严重抹黑。

相信在俄政府的暖心慰问下，会有更多俄罗斯人投身于解放顿巴斯的伟大事业当中，特别军事行动必将按计划进行。
